overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive along a dystopian highway at dusk. The camera moves past illuminated digital billboards and industrial smokestacks, transitioning from open road to a traffic intersection with passing vehicles. The atmosphere is moody with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights and a hazy mountain backdrop.

agents.ego_description: cruising along the highway at moderate speed, passing large digital billboards on the left

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying colorful advertisements with purple and red tones
tall modern street lamp with orange glowing light fixture
tall metal lattice communications tower against the mountain backdrop
hazy mountain silhouette forming the horizon line
metal highway barrier with red and white stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide highway at dusk, driving past a large digital billboard on the left. The wet asphalt reflects the dim natural light while distant mountains and industrial structures form the backdrop. Street lights begin to illuminate as the camera moves steadily forward along the empty road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approaching industrial intersection with smokestacks

events.description: exits billboard-lined highway section, approaching industrial zone with visible smokestacks
street lights become more prominent as natural light fades, mixed lighting conditions

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway while slowing down, approaching the traffic intersection ahead

entered.detail: large metal structure spanning the road with directional signs and traffic lights
industrial chimney emitting thick black smoke into the evening sky
large factory structure with multiple windows and industrial architecture
piles of blue and white trash bags accumulated on the roadside

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions into an industrial area with prominent smokestacks emitting dark plumes. The camera approaches an overhead traffic gantry while the first billboard disappears from view. Street lights become more dominant as the natural light fades, and piles of garbage bags become visible along the roadside.

events.description: comes to a complete stop at the red traffic light at the intersection
pickup truck and van pass through the intersection from left to right
traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light on the intersection shoulder, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: pickup truck driving through the intersection from left to right
white van following the pickup truck through the intersection

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red light mounted on the gantry pole

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at a traffic intersection beneath an overhead gantry, waiting at a red light. Two vehicles—a pickup truck and a van—pass through the intersection. The surroundings feature industrial buildings with smoking chimneys and accumulated garbage bags along the concrete sidewalk. The traffic light changes to green as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a dystopian highway at dusk that transitions from an open road into a congested industrial intersection. It begins by gliding past a large digital billboard on a stretch of wet asphalt, with distant mountains and industrial silhouettes framing the horizon as street lights flicker on. As the camera moves forward, the open highway shifts into a grittier industrial zone where dark plumes rise from prominent smokestacks and piles of garbage bags accumulate along the roadside. The scene then culminates as the camera slows to a halt at a red light beneath an overhead gantry, watching a pickup truck and a van pass through the intersection amidst the glow of neon and smog. Finally, the environment settles into a static wait beside concrete sidewalks and smoking chimneys before the traffic light turns green.
